ddls:
CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Name of the institution offering the program */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the institution is located */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the program */,
  "program_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the program (e.g., 1 year, 2 years) */,
  "program_language" TEXT /* Language of instruction for the program */,
  "program_level" TEXT /* Level of the program (e.g., undergraduate, graduate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated program */,
  "foreign_course_title" TEXT /* Title of the foreign course */,
  "foreign_credits" INTEGER /* Credits associated with the foreign course */,
  "utk_credit_hours" INTEGER /* UTK equivalent credit hours */,
  "ld_or_ud" TEXT /* Level designation of the course (e.g., LD for Lower Division, UD for Upper Division) */,
  "transfer_credit_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of transfer credit */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "course_level" TEXT /* Level of the course (e.g., introductory, advanced) */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course (e.g., courses, GPA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_transfer_credit_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("transfer_credit_type_id") REFERENCES credit_types ("credit_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* International code for the country (e.g., DE for Germany, US for USA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_types" (
  "credit_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit type */,
  "credit_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the credit type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the credit type */,
  "credit_hours_required" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours required for the credit type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, advisor) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfer_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transfer policy */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfer_policies_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_equivalencies" (
  "equivalency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equivalency */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the foreign course */,
  "local_course_title" TEXT /* Title of the local equivalent course */,
  "local_credit_hours" INTEGER /* Credit hours for the local course */,
  "equivalency_status" TEXT /* Status of the equivalency (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equivalency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_equivalencies_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_offerings" (
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course offering */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated program */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course being offered */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester when the course is offered (e.g., Spring, Fall) */,
  "academic_year" INTEGER /* Academic year when the course is offered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)
